allow: Bash(node -e "try{const Parser=require\('expr-eval'\).Parser; const p=new Parser\(\); const e=p.parse\('a + b * 2'\); console.log\('eval:', e.evaluate\({a:1,b:3}\)\); console.log\('vars:', e.variables\(\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERR',e.message\)}")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const d={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('pg:',d.pg||'-'\); console.log\('mysql2:',d.mysql2||'-'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3:',d['better-sqlite3']||'-'\); console.log\('sqlite3:',d.sqlite3||'-'\); console.log\('node-cron:',d['node-cron']||'-'\); console.log\('bull/bullmq:',d.bullmq||d.bull||'-'\); console.log\('typeorm:',d.typeorm||'-'\); console.log\('knex:',d.knex||'-'\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('data',[]\); print\('items:',len\(items\)\); print\('first id:', items[0].get\('id'\) if items else None\); print\('first has stats:', 'stats' in items[0] if items else None\); print\('first stats keys:', list\(\(items[0].get\('stats'\) or {}\).keys\(\)\)[:6] if items and items[0].get\('stats'\) else items[0].get\('stats'\) if items else None\)")

Bash(echo "=== enrichment output \(raw, look for stats\) ==="; curl -s -m 60 -X POST "http://localhost:3000/api/data/fetch-with-transforms" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"bindingId":"8ef6c2d4-9e9f-4e1e-a9b0-6b892b9135ea"}' 2>/dev/null > /tmp/enriched.json; wc -c < /tmp/enriched.json; echo "--- does it contain stats? ---"; grep -o '"stats":[^,]*' /tmp/enriched.json | head -3; echo "--- count of stats occurrences ---"; grep -o '"stats"' /tmp/enriched.json | wc -l; echo "--- first 600 chars ---"; head -c 600 /tmp/enriched.json)

Bash(cd /d/CodeRepository/GH_site/visual-cms/public-site; echo "=== data binding runtime present? ==="; grep -c "Visual CMS Data Binding Runtime\\|_dataSources\\|fetch-with-transforms\\|_bindings" index.html; echo "=== _dataSources content \(if any\) ==="; grep -o '_dataSources = \\[[^;]*' index.html | head -c 300; echo; echo "=== any data-element-id with gh-1776249962431-22 \(hero block\) ==="; grep -c "gh-1776249962431-22\\|gh-premium-1771840286937-100" index.html; echo "=== file mtime vs now ==="; date; stat -c '%y' index.html 2>/dev/null || ls -la index.html)

Bash(node -e "try{console.log\('@types/pg:', require\('./node_modules/@types/pg/package.json'\).version\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('@types/pg: MISSING'\)}; try{console.log\('pg:', require\('./node_modules/pg/package.json'\).version\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('pg: MISSING'\)}; try{console.log\('mysql2:', require\('./node_modules/mysql2/package.json'\).version\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('mysql2: MISSING'\)}")

Bash(node -e "try{require.resolve\('pg'\);console.log\('pg resolvable'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('pg NOT resolvable'\)}; try{require.resolve\('mysql2/promise'\);console.log\('mysql2 resolvable'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('mysql2 NOT resolvable'\)}")

Bash(node -e "try{require.resolve\('mysql2/promise'\);console.log\('mysql2 resolvable'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('mysql2 NOT resolvable'\)}; try{console.log\('@types/pg:', require\('./node_modules/@types/pg/package.json'\).version\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('@types/pg MISSING'\)}; const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('dep mysql2:', p.dependencies.mysql2, '| devDep @types/pg:', \(p.devDependencies||{}\)['@types/pg']\)")

Bash(node -e "try{require.resolve\('pg'\);console.log\('pg ok'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('pg NO'\)}; const fs=require\('fs'\); const path='./node_modules/@types/pg/index.d.ts'; console.log\('@types/pg file:', fs.existsSync\(path\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new D\(':memory:'\); db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(id int\); INSERT INTO t VALUES \(1\),\(2\)'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 works:', db.prepare\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM t'\).get\(\)\); const ro=new D\(':memory:',{readonly:false}\); console.log\('node-cron validate:', require\('node-cron'\).validate\('*/5 * * * *'\)\)")
